property.name: defaultValue
property.label: 01. Default Value
property.description: The initial value to select. For multi-select, use a semicolon-separated string (e.g., Value1;Value2).

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: 02. Object API Name
property.description: The API Name of the Salesforce object (e.g., Account).

property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: 03. Field API Name
property.description: The API Name of the picklist field (e.g., Type).

property.name: labelOverride
property.label: 04. Label Override
property.description: Overrides the standard field label. If left blank, the field's metadata label is used.

property.name: helpText
property.label: 05. Inline Help Text
property.description: Displays a help icon with this text next to the field label.

property.name: multiSelect
property.label: 06. Multi-select Picklist
property.description: If true, displays a Dual Listbox for multi-select picklists. If false, shows a standard dropdown.

property.name: required
property.label: 07. Required
property.description: If true, the Flow will prevent navigation until a value is selected.

property.name: readOnlyMode
property.label: 08. Read Only Mode
property.description: Displays the value as text inside a grey box.

property.name: disabled
property.label: 09. Disabled
property.description: Grey-out the input to prevent user interaction.

property.name: useRecordType
property.label: 10. Record Type Needed?
property.description: If true, filters picklist values based on a specific Record Type.

property.name: recordTypeIdentifier
property.label: 11. Record Type Identifier
property.description: Provide the Record Type ID, Developer Name, or Label to filter the values.

property.name: value
property.label: Selected Value (Output)
property.description: The value(s) selected by the user.
